---
title: "TAX POLICY CENTER TARIFF MODEL"
subtitle: "Modeling tariff impacts at the state level and beyond"
date: "February 2028"
author:
  - name: "Author Name"
format:
  tpc-revealjs: default
---

## Overview

TPC's tariff model analyzes the impact of tariffs on household incomes at the **national and state levels.**

::: {.two-col}

::: {.col}
**What we do**

- 120 million distinct tariff rates per year
- 10 billion rates for a 10-year estimate
- National and state-level impacts
:::

::: {.col}
**Who we serve**

- Federal policymakers
- State and local governments
- Researchers and media
:::

:::

## Methodology

Our model handles day-to-day variations in effective tariff rates for every good from every country.

::: {.box-deepblue}
**Key Insight:** The Tax Policy Center's tariff model is the most sophisticated model housed outside of a government agency.
:::

In addition to total tariff revenues, we estimate impacts on household incomes, businesses, and the broader economy.

---

::: {.figure-label}
FIGURE 1
:::

Insert your chart or figure here.

::: {.note-box}
**Note:** Data sourced from USITC trade statistics. Estimates reflect current tariff schedules.
:::

## Data Summary

| Category     | Value    | Change |
|--------------|----------|--------|
| Total Revenue| $1.2T    | +12%   |
| Household Avg| -$1,500  | —      |
| State Impact | Varies   | —      |

## Key Findings

::: {.two-col}

::: {.col}
::: {.box-teal}
**Bottom Quintile:** Households in the bottom income quintile bear the **largest relative burden** from tariffs as a share of income.
:::
:::

::: {.col}
::: {.box-light}
**Top Quintile:** Higher-income households face a **lower effective rate** as tariff costs represent a smaller share of total spending.
:::
:::

:::

## State-Level Variation

Manufacturing-heavy states face outsized impacts from retaliatory tariffs on exported goods.

::: {.note-box}
**Methodology note:** State-level estimates use a proportional allocation model based on consumption patterns and industry employment shares.
:::

## Contact & Resources

Find our work at **taxpolicycenter.org**

::: {.box-deepblue}
**Get in Touch:** Our team is equipped to help state and local governments and stakeholders assess the impact of tariffs on their regional economies.
:::
